name: Llama-3.1-Swallow-8B-Instruct-v0.5
description: Llama 3.1 Swallow is a series of large language models (8B, 70B) that were built by continual pre-training on the [Meta Llama 3.1](https://huggingface.co/collections/meta-llama/llama-31-669fc079a0c406a149a5738f) models. Llama 3.1 Swallow enhanced the Japanese language capabilities of the original Llama 3.1 while retaining the English language capabilities.
tagline: Llama 3.1 Swallow is a series of large language models (8B, 70B) that were built by continual pre-training on the [Meta Llama 3.1](https://huggingface.co/collections/meta-llama/llama-31-669fc079a0c406a149a5738f) models.
